urdu transliteration text:
Baynul Haramayn
Zainab is crying near Abbas and Husayn
Baynul Haramayn
english translation text:
The night has fallen on Baynul Haramayn
Oppressed and left in shame, all I feel now is pain

urdu transliteration text: The heat’s unbearable my grief unstoppable
english translation text:
As I stand all alone by the burning tents
All of the sons are left laid on the battlefield
Who’ll pick their bodies up and bring them back to me?

My sons were martyred by the ruthless enemy
Oh mother please come and share this pain with me
On the right my dear Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Baynul Haramayn
Zainab is crying near Abbas and Husayn
english translation text: The night has fallen on Baynul Haramayn

urdu transliteration text:
Akhi Abbas say thi ek dharas mujhay
Mera Shabbir bhi mera muhafiz hai
Mera Abbas jab suwe dariya gaya
Mera maqna bhi mera sarse gir gaya
My head covering fell
english translation text:
I expected only one thing from Brother Abbas (my protector)
My Shabbir was also my protector
When my Abbas went towards the river

urdu transliteration text:
Mai hu Zainab main unko yaad karti hu
Mai ab bhi Karbala say jab guzarti hu
Wo hai ghazi mera wo hai bhayya Husayn
I am Zainab nad I am remembering them
whenever I visit Karbala
english translation text: One is my warrior and another my brother Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Baynul Haramayn
Zainab is crying near Abbas and Husayn
english translation text: The night has fallen on Baynul Haramayn

urdu transliteration text:
Najaf say aati hai Ali ki ye sada
Mere nazron main hai ab bhi Karbala
Wo tapti rayt hai wo jalti khaak hai
Yahin par la ilaha illallah bacha
english translation text:
The call of Ali is emanating from Najaf
Karbala is still in my thoughts
The burnt ground?? the hot sands
This is where La Ilaha Illallah was saved

urdu transliteration text:
Meray doh bete the aur dono shayr the
Kata kay apnay sar ko deen bacha gaye
Mera abbas bhi bana misl-e-Husayn
My Abbas emulated Hussain
english translation text:
My two sons who were both lions
They sacrificed their heads to save the religion

urdu transliteration text:
Baynul Haramayn
Zainab is crying near Abbas and Husayn
english translation text: The night has fallen on Baynul Haramayn

urdu transliteration text: The final resting place of Abbas and Husayn
english translation text:
The land of Karbala the desert and the heat
The Earth is shaking the skies are crying

The world is mourning their enduring pain
Zainab is crying for her brothers and her sons
Her tears are flowing with the setting sun
Her heart is aching for her Abbas and Husayn

Baynul Haramayn
english translation text:
The night has fallen on Baynul Haramayn
Oppressed and left in shame, all I feel now is pain
